interpretation: V1.34BI formalizes the stack the branch has been converging toward: board lockout first, anti-false-bounce local rebound guard second, board unlock third, seed reentry ladder last.
This makes the user's intuition explicit: a few strong names can exist inside a weak board, but they cannot release a board-level cooling lockout on their own.
